payload.claim: the dominant synthetic crack cluster was reconstructed from unresolved dependencies and invariant failures
payload.next_use: locate crack origin and repair behavior before real-agent testing

payload.claim: pre-registered endurance gates were evaluated on untouched seeds
payload.next_use: decide which endurance mechanism survives a real-agent test

payload.claim: frontier geometry, equal-budget repair, null specificity, and root-cause recovery were evaluated on frozen held-out seeds
payload.next_use: separate geometry instrumentation from claims about deployed agents

payload.claim: matched Ulam, random-sparse, clustered, and conflict-aware spacing conditions were evaluated without changing event order or random draws
payload.next_use: test graph-informed spacing on real agent traces; do not treat Ulam as a semantic separator

payload.claim: finite verified inheritance was tested over a 40/80/160 doubling ladder against continuous history and an equal-budget ordinary summary
payload.next_use: test capsule construction on real agent traces; preserve the 160-cycle and conflict-scheduling failures

payload.claim: v0.5.0 scientific artifacts are pinned byte-for-byte and v0.6.0 generational-endurance results are independently recomputable
payload.claim_boundary: v0.6 recomputes generational endurance and verifies inherited v0.5 artifacts against pinned lineage; it does not rerun inherited first-contact or collision-spacing worlds
